meta.race_name: Win £250,000 With BetMGM's Golden Goals Classified Stakes (Class 6)

rankings.name: Homer Stokes
key_positive_factors: Won over 1m at this course just 6 days ago
Excellent recent form sequence (221)
Strong course specialist on Tapeta
key_risks: Carries a penalty for recent win
Dropping back in trip from 1m to 7f

rankings.name: Ring Of Gold
key_positive_factors: Very consistent with runner-up finishes in last two starts
Official 'Postdata' selection for the race
Proven ability to handle Southwell surface
key_risks: Has become a bit of a bridesmaid recently
Lacks a win in 2026

rankings.name: Elettaria
key_positive_factors: Official Racing Post 'Spotlight' selection
Late-closing style often effective in these classified events
Competitive OR for this grade
key_risks: Highly dependent on a strong early pace to close into
Beaten fairly comfortably last time out

rankings.name: Captain Pickles
key_positive_factors: Recent winner two starts ago
Handles the Class 6 classified stakes level well
key_risks: Disappointing 6th-place finish in most recent outing
Needs to prove consistency is returning

rankings.name: Laura's Breeze
key_positive_factors: Solid 2nd at this track three runs back
Kevin Stott is a notable jockey booking
key_risks: Form has dipped slightly in last two runs
Struggles to get its head in front at the finish

rankings.name: Embarked
key_positive_factors: Signs of life with a 3rd place finish last time
Trainer Scott Dixon often targets Southwell
key_risks: Long losing streak stretching back many months
Relatively low Official Rating (43)

rankings.name: Evoluir
key_positive_factors: Occasional decent effort in this grade
Stable is capable of readying one at a price
key_risks: Generally out of form in recent starts
Poor win record

rankings.name: Mighty Power
key_positive_factors: Has shown glimpses of ability in much higher grades in the past
key_risks: Currently showing very little of its old form
Sequence of poor results (788)

rankings.name: Mr Slicker
key_positive_factors: Veteran campaigner who knows how to win
key_risks: Likely lacks the legs to compete with improving younger rivals
Form is on a downward trend

rankings.name: Princess Vivi
key_positive_factors: Feather-weight in this field due to low OR
key_risks: Significantly outclassed even in Class 6 company
No recent form to recommend

rankings.name: Morning Suit
key_positive_factors: Stable can occasionally pull off a surprise
key_risks: Abysmal recent form (00/97)
Very long time since last win

rankings.name: War Memorial
key_positive_factors: Dylan Hogan is a competent rider for this level
key_risks: Shown absolutely nothing in last three starts
Bottom of the form pile

tricast_top_3.combination: Homer Stokes > Ring Of Gold > Elettaria
Homer Stokes > Ring Of Gold > Captain Pickles
Ring Of Gold > Homer Stokes > Elettaria

pace_analysis.insight: Dropping back from 1m, Homer Stokes is likely to be ridden prominently to make use of his proven stamina and recent winning fitness.
